hero.subtitle: Personal portfolio projects and self-hosted open-source tools running on a VPS. Some are built by me, some are just things I run.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.desc: Backend Developer & Technical Lead. 12+ years architecting systems that scale — billing infrastructure, LATAM APIs, team leadership.

wsb.title: Webhook Sync Bridge
wsb.desc: Async-to-sync subscription flow using Redis BLPOP. A partner API fires an XML webhook asynchronously — the user sees an instant, synchronous result.

webmail.title: Webmail
webmail.desc: Roundcube — open-source webmail client. Self-hosted with docker-mailserver for full IMAP/SMTP control.

hoppscotch.title: Hoppscotch
hoppscotch.desc: Open-source API testing platform. Self-hosted instance for REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket testing.

tools.title: IT Tools
tools.desc: IT-Tools by Corentin Thomasset — open-source collection of handy developer utilities. Self-hosted for offline access.

snippets.title: Snippet Box
snippets.desc: Snippet Box by Pawel Malak — open-source snippet manager. Self-hosted to keep code fragments organized and private.

npm.title: Nginx Proxy Manager
npm.desc: Open-source reverse proxy UI. Manages SSL certificates and routing for all services on this VPS.
